basics.name: Thiago Luiz Silva Pereira
basics.label: Full Stack Developer and Tech Leader
basics.summary: Software Developer, Tech Lead and Mentor with 20+ years of experience. Specialized in .Net (C#/F#), Node.js, Angular 2+, React, Azure, Microservices, Serverless Architecture, TDD, DDD, and AI Chat Bots/Agents. Proven track record of scaling systems from dozens to thousands of requests per minute, leading teams, mentoring developers, and building products from scratch.

work.name: BairesDev
work.position: Tech Lead, Full-Stack Developer, and Mentor
work.summary: Tech Lead, Full-Stack Developer, and Mentor working with Microsoft technologies (Azure, .Net, SQL Server), Go, Node.js, Angular, React, and Vue.js.
highlights: Migrated legacy applications to microservice solutions with Azure Functions in record time
Introduced TDD culture — hundreds of tests covering critical paths, securing deployments
Automated API client generation for JavaScript with OpenAPI and DevOps, reducing frontend adoption time
Received R&D Spotlight Award for Q4 2021 at a key player in the hospitality industry
Led migration of monolith applications to microservices with Node.js, Express, and Next.js
Used Kubernetes/Argo CD to automatically scale dockerized applications
Configured Docker Compose to enable legacy application maintenance and improvements
Supported AngularJS to Angular 2+ migration in critical game/team management applications
Mentored developers to increase productivity across multiple clients

work.name: White Fox (B&T)
work.summary: Full-Stack developer and tech leader for one of Brazil's most outstanding money exchange brokers. Worked with C#, F#, WCF, NHibernate, Node.js, Angular 2+, and React using agile methodologies (Scrum, TDD, XP).
highlights: Implemented TDD culture, eliminating regressions and bugs in production
Automated deployments with Azure DevOps and management activities with Microsoft Bot Framework
Evolved monoliths into microservices via SQL/Azure ServiceBroker, scaling from dozens to thousands of requests per minute
Integrated with Brazil's Central Bank (Bacen STA), Federal Revenue Service, PIX, and Bitcoin payments
Implemented cross-domain libraries in F# for proper DDD abstractions and encapsulation
Migrated internal scheduling system to F# and Azure Functions, reducing maintenance cost and increasing performance
Ensured MonoRepos and Modular Monolithic applications work across 20 years and multiple .Net versions
Ported ActiveWriter to Visual Studio 2017, 2019, and 2022 for legacy NHibernate applications
Since 03/2021, continued as consultant for critical solutions and specifications

work.name: Ecorp
work.summary: Senior consultant and developer in Microsoft BizTalk, SharePoint, SQL Server, ASP.NET. Worked directly with Light and L'Oréal performing technical management, requirements gathering, and SAP integrations.
highlights: Implemented BizTalk integration between Oracle problem system and SAP mobile gateway, handling all external support requests for Light customers in Rio de Janeiro
Automated publishing of Light KPIs from Excel into the company's internal SharePoint

work.name: Oi - Accenture
work.summary: Maintenance of CRM/ERP systems for the Oi Tsunami project (SIA) and EPM with C# (ASP.Net and Desktop), SQL Server, WCF, and Oracle.
highlights: Built M.A.R.T — a walkthrough system using external APIs for phone line quality testing that guided call-center operators
Improved monthly conciliation process (Batimento) performance by 24x — from 12 hours to under 30 minutes

work.name: Always Web
work.summary: Programming in C#, VB, PHP, JavaScript, ASP, and ActionScript. Project Manager and Team Leader managing two teams between Rio de Janeiro and São Paulo. Clients: Aliança do Brasil (Banco do Brasil), Cultura Inglesa, Thomson Edu.

work.name: AG Sistemas
work.summary: Web Developer with PHP and ASP Classic. Developed Apligraf's CRM/ERP for StockMarket and Digipix's photographic revelation service, still used by major Brazilian e-commerces (Americanas.com, Submarino, Shoptime, Saraiva, Extra).

awards.title: R&D Spotlight Award
awards.summary: Recognized as a key contributor for outstanding technical leadership and delivery in Q4 2021.

interests.name: Martial Arts
keywords: Ving Tsun Kung Fu Master (25 years of practice)

projects.name: SIG (Integrated Management System)
projects.description: CRM/ERP system for MYVT MI.IM written in TypeScript (Node.js backend) and Angular 2+ frontend. Uses Firebase for real-time sync across multiple branches, with planned expansion to Angola and Miami.
highlights: Full-stack TypeScript application
Real-time multi-branch sync with Firebase
Multinational expansion planned

projects.name: Jarvis — AI Virtual Assistant
projects.description: AI chatbot using Microsoft Bot Framework and LUIS (Language Understanding Service) for Skype and Microsoft Teams. Automated scrum master activities, billing, planning, and common tasks.
highlights: Natural language processing with LUIS
Scrum master automation
Built with TypeScript and Node.js

projects.name: Genesys SRD
projects.description: Gatsby PWA for Grifo Editorial — an offline reference guide for tabletop RPG players with automated publication via Vercel.

projects.name: Elug |> RJ — Elixir Meetup
projects.description: Co-organizer of the Rio de Janeiro Elixir meetup group. Led hands-on events building a real-time WebRTC audio/video chat and a multiplayer starship game.
highlights: Real-time WebRTC audio/video chat
Multiplayer game with Elixir/OTP
